2026-04-29FINCanada Revenue Agency ActAppointment of a director of the Board of Management of the Canada Revenue AgencyAppointment of Carole Gagnon of Saint-Augustin-de-Desmaures, Quebec, to be a director of the Board of Management of the Canada Revenue Agency, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.N/A
subject: Appointment of a director of the Board of Management of the Canada Revenue Agency
precis: Appointment of Carole Gagnon of Saint-Augustin-de-Desmaures, Quebec, to be a director of the Board of Management of the Canada Revenue Agency, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.
